effect_cn: 出牌阶段对攻击范围内的一名角色使用，造成1点伤害。
effect_en: Used during the Action Phase to deal 1 damage to a player within your attack range.
Used to negate the effect of a [Slash].

effect_cn: 对距离为1的一名角色使用，获得其一张牌（手牌、装备或判定区）。
effect_en: Target a player at distance 1. Take one card from their hand, equipment, or pending judgment zone.

effect_cn: 判定阶段进行判定：若判定结果不为红桃，跳过其出牌阶段。
effect_en: Judgment: If the result is not Hearts, the target player skips their Action Phase this turn.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定与你性别不同的一个目标后，你可以令其选择一项：1. 弃置一张手牌；2. 令你摸一张牌。
effect_en: When you use [Kill] to target a person of a different gender than you, you can make them choose one of the following: 1. Discard a card from their hand; 2. Make you draw a card.

effect_cn: 每当你需要使用或打出一张【闪】时，你可以进行一次判定。若判定结果为红色，视为你使用或打出了一张【闪】。
effect_en: Whenever you need to use or play a [Dodge], you may perform a Judgment. If the result is Red (Hearts or Diamonds), it is treated as if you used or played a [Dodge].

faq.q_cn: 如果判定结果是黑色，我还能从手牌打出【闪】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。如果判定失败，你仍然可以正常从手牌使用【闪】。
faq.q_en: If the Judgment is Black, can I still play a [Dodge] from my hand?
faq.a_en: Yes. If the judgment fails, you are still permitted to play a [Dodge] from your hand as normal.

faq.q_cn: 张角可以使用“鬼道”修改这个判定吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。所有具备修改判定技能的武将都可以影响八卦阵的判定结果。
faq.q_en: Can Zhang Jiao use 'Guidao' to change this judgment?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any hero with a judgment-altering skill can change the result of Eight Trigrams.

effect_cn: 当你计算与其他角色的距离时，始终-1。
effect_en: When calculating your distance to other characters, the distance is decreased by 1.

faq.q_cn: -1 马可以让我攻击到更远的人吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。它让你看别人更“近”，从而让对方进入你的武器攻击范围。
faq.q_en: Does a -1 Mount allow me to attack further players?
faq.a_en: Yes. It makes others appear 'closer' to you, potentially bringing them into your weapon's attack range.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离时，始终+1。
effect_en: When other characters calculate their distance to you, the distance is increased by 1.

faq.q_cn: 如果我有+1马，对方只有范围1的武器，他能杀到我吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。除非对方装备了-1马或者更长距离的武器。
faq.q_en: If I have a +1 Mount and the opponent has a Range 1 weapon, can they Slash me?
faq.a_en: No. They would need a -1 Mount or a longer-range weapon to reach you.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张手牌置于武将牌上，称为“储备”。若你的装备区里有“木牛流马”，你可以将“储备”牌交给一名其他角色，并将其移动到该角色的装备区。
effect_en: Once per turn during your action phase, you may place one card face down under the [Wooden Ox] in your equipment zone, and then you may place the [Wooden Ox] into another character's equipment zone; you may use or play the cards under the [Wooden Ox and Flowing Horse] as if they were in your hand.

faq.a_cn: 不算。它们不在你的手牌中，因此不受顺手牵羊（对标手牌时）或过河拆桥的影响，除非对方选择弃掉你的装备。
faq.q_en: Do the cards in 'Reserve' count as hand cards?
faq.a_en: No. They are not in your hand and are unaffected by skills targeting hand cards. They are lost only if the Wooden Ox itself is discarded or stolen.

faq.q_cn: 我可以一次性把所有“储备”牌都传给下一个人吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。当你把木牛流马传给别人时，所有的“储备”牌都会一并移交给那个人。
faq.q_en: Can I transfer all 'Reserve' cards at once?
faq.a_en: Yes. When you pass the Wooden Ox to another player, all cards currently in the 'Reserve' are transferred to them.
